---
id: get-rule
title: "Get STP rule by ID"
description: "Returns a single STP rule by its identifier, regardless of enabled status."
sidebar_label: "Get STP rule by ID"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get STP rule by ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/stp/rules/{ruleId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a single STP rule by its identifier, regardless of enabled status.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
